who: accounting staff at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For accounting staff at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: reconciliation of vendor invoices and purchase orders
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting staff
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting staff with demo video
Join community forums for accounting tool sharing
try_it: Let users try manual entry for invoice data and basic reporting on discrepancies on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
